                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Pattern Value{
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          "coding" : [{
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            "system" : "http://loinc.org",
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            "code" : "30954-2"
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          }]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        120. Composition.section:sectionResults.text
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHALL:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          122. Composition.section:sectionResults.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The relevant observation results collected on the patient or produced on in-vitro biologic specimens collected from the patient. Some results could be laboratory results, others could be anatomic pathology results, others could be radiology results, and others could be clinical results.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ShortRelevant observation results collected on the patient or produced on in-vitro biologic specimens collected from the patient
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          TypeReference(Observation, DiagnosticReport, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • type @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • 124. Composition.section:sectionResults.entry:results-observation-laboratory-pathology
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Slice Nameresults-observation-laboratory-pathology
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            TypeReference(AU PS Pathology Result Observation)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHOULD:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              126. Composition.section:sectionResults.entry:results-observation-radiology
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Slice Nameresults-observation-radiology
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Comments

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Implementers populating Composition.section:sectionResults.entry:results-observation-radiology with Observation Results - Radiology (IPS) are recommended to consider the corresponding AU Base Diagnostic Imaging Report profile as guidance for that resource type in an Australian healthcare context.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              TypeReference(Observation Results - Radiology (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                128. Composition.section:sectionResults.entry:results-diagnosticReport
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Slice Nameresults-diagnosticReport
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Comments

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Implementers populating Composition.section:sectionResults.entry:results-diagnosticReport with DiagnosticReport (IPS) are recommended to consider the corresponding AU Base DiagnosticReport profile as guidance for that resource type in an Australian healthcare context.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                TypeReference(DiagnosticReport (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  130. Composition.section:sectionProceduresHx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Slice NamesectionProceduresHx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Information about a patient's past procedures that are pertinent to the scope of this patient summary. Procedures could refer, for example to:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  1. Invasive Diagnostic procedure: e.g. Cardiac catheterization; (the results of these procedure are documented in the results section)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  2. Therapeutic procedure: e.g. dialysis;
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  3. Surgical procedure: e.g. appendectomy
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ShortPatient Summary History of Procedures Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    SHOULD:populate-if-knownAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    132. Composition.section:sectionProceduresHx.title
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      134. Composition.section:sectionProceduresHx.code
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      TypeCodeableConcept(Codeable Concept (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Pattern Value{
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          "coding" : [{
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            "system" : "http://loinc.org",
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            "code" : "47519-4"
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          }]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        136. Composition.section:sectionProceduresHx.text
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHALL:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          138. Composition.section:sectionProceduresHx.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The patient's past procedures that are pertinent to the scope of this patient summary. Procedures can refer for example to:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          1. Invasive Diagnostic procedure: e.g. Cardiac catheterization; (the results of these procedure are documented in the results section)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          2. Therapeutic procedure: e.g. dialysis;
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          3. Surgical procedure: e.g. appendectomy. An entry can be used to document that no information about past procedures is available, or that no relevant past procedures are known.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ShortPatient past procedures pertinent to the scope of this patient summary
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          TypeReference(Procedure, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • 140. Composition.section:sectionProceduresHx.entry:procedure
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Slice Nameprocedure
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            TypeReference(AU PS Procedure)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHOULD:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              142. Composition.section:sectionMedicalDevices
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Slice NamesectionMedicalDevices
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Information about a patient's history of medical device use.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ShortPatient Summary Medical Devices Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:populate-if-knownAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                144.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer

Composition.section:sectionMedicalDevices.text
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      150. Composition.section:sectionMedicalDevices.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The patient's history of medical device use. An entry can be used to document that no information about medical device use is available, or that no relevant medical device use is known.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ShortPatient history of medical device use
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      TypeReference(DeviceUseStatement, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 152. Composition.section:sectionMedicalDevices.entry:deviceStatement
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Slice NamedeviceStatement
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        TypeReference(DeviceUseStatement (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHOULD:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          154.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer

The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    166. Composition.section:sectionAlerts
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Slice NamesectionAlerts
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Information about a patient's alerts pertinent to the scope of the patient summary including flagging potential concerns and/or dangers to/from the patient and can also include obstacles to care.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ShortPatient Summary Alerts Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      168. Composition.section:sectionAlerts.title
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Must Supporttrue

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SHALL:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
