                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            174. Composition.section:sectionAlerts.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The alert information to be communicated; can optionally reference other resources in the patient summary.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            ShortAlert information
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            TypeReference(Flag, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 176. Composition.section:sectionAlerts.entry:alertsFlag
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Slice NamealertsFlag
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              TypeReference(Flag - Alert (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              178. Composition.section:sectionFunctionalStatus
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Slice NamesectionFunctionalStatus
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Information about a patient's functional status including a description of capability of the patient to perform acts of daily living, including possible needs of the patient to be continuously assessed by third parties. The invalidity status can in fact influence decisions about how to administer treatments.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ShortPatient Summary Functional Status Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                180. Composition.section:sectionFunctionalStatus.title
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  SHALL:populateAU PS Producer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  182.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Control1..?

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      186. Composition.section:sectionFunctionalStatus.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The patient's capability to perform acts of daily living, including possible needs of the patient to be continuously assessed by third parties. The invalidity status can in fact influence decisions about how to administer treatments.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ShortDisabilities and functional assessments
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      TypeReference(Condition, ClinicalImpression, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 188.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Slice NamefunctionalAssessment

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        192. Composition.section:sectionPastProblems
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Slice NamesectionPastProblems
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Information about a patient's conditions that were suffered in the past and are no longer tracked in the Problem List.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShortPatient Summary History of Past Illness Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          194. Composition.section:sectionPastProblems.title
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Control1..?

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                200. Composition.section:sectionPastProblems.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The conditions the patient suffered in the past and are no longer tracked in the Problem List.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ShortConditions the patient suffered in the past
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                TypeReference(Condition, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • profile @ resolve()

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Slice NamepastProblem
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  TypeReference(AU PS Condition)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  204. Composition.section:sectionPregnancyHx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Slice NamesectionPregnancyHx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Information about whether a patient is currently pregnant or not and can contain additional summarising information about the outcome of earlier pregnancies.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ShortPatient Summary History of Pregnancy Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    206. Composition.section:sectionPregnancyHx.title
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Control1..?
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:populateAU PS Producer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          212. Composition.section:sectionPregnancyHx.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Information about whether the patient is currently pregnant or not. It can contain additional summarising information about the outcome of earlier pregnancies.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ShortCurrent pregnancy status and, optionally, information about the outcome of earlier pregnancies
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          TypeReference(Observation, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • 214. Composition.section:sectionPregnancyHx.entry:pregnancyStatus
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Slice NamepregnancyStatus
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            TypeReference(Observation Pregnancy - Status (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            216. Composition.section:sectionPregnancyHx.entry:pregnancyOutcome
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Slice NamepregnancyOutcome
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Control0..*
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            TypeReference(Observation Pregnancy - Outcome (IPS))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            218. Composition.section:sectionPatientStory
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Slice NamesectionPatientStory
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Information about what matters to a patient. This can include needs, strengths, values, concerns and preferences to others providing support and care. The patient's story, provided here, can be told by the patient or by a proxy.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            ShortPatient Summary Patient Story Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              220.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    226. Composition.section:sectionPatientStory.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The information about what matters to a patient. This can include needs, strengths, values, concerns and preferences to others providing support and care.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ShortPatient Story resources
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    228. Composition.section:sectionPlanOfCare
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Slice NamesectionPlanOfCare
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Information about a patient's plans of care containing the expectations for care including proposals, goals, and order requests for monitoring, tracking, or improving the condition of the patient.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ShortPatient Summary Plan of Care Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Must Supporttrue
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Obligations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ObligationsActor
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      230.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Control1..?

Composition.section:sectionPlanOfCare.text
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Control1..?

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            236. Composition.section:sectionPlanOfCare.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The dynamic, personalised care plans including identified needed healthcare activity, health objectives and healthcare goals, relating to one or more specified health issues in a healthcare process.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            ShortStructured care plans
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            TypeReference(CarePlan, ImmunizationRecommendation, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • profile @ resolve()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 238. Composition.section:sectionSocialHistory
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Slice NamesectionSocialHistory
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Information about a patient's health related "lifestyle factors" or "lifestyle observations" (e.g. smoke habits, alcohol consumption, diets, risky habits).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ShortPatient Summary Social History Section
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Must Supporttrue

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHALL:handleAU PS Consumer
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SHOULD:displayAU PS Consumer

Composition.section:sectionSocialHistory.entry
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Definition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The patient's health related "lifestyle factors" or "lifestyle observations" (e.g. smoke habits, alcohol consumption, diets, risky habits.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ShortHealth related "lifestyle factors" or "lifestyle observations"
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      TypeReference(Observation, DocumentReference)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      SlicingThis element introduces a set of slices on Composition.section.entry. The slices areUnordered and Open, and can be differentiated using the following discriminators:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • profile @ resolve()

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Slice NamesmokingTobaccoUse
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Control0..1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        TypeReference(AU PS Smoking Status)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        254.
